response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering skills and some relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, but lacks direct leadership experience scaling fintech or regulated AI systems. His background in distributed systems and event-driven platforms is valuable, but his fintech and agentic-AI depth fall short of the executive-level requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong distributed systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, re:cinq)
Demonstrated ability to build and scale systems handling real-time data (e.g., Dunnhumby media)
Open-source contribution and technical leadership in development communities
concerns: No direct fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lacks executive-level leadership experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people
Limited experience operating AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
